sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ سَمِيرٌ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: لَبِسَ بَدْلَةً رَسْمِيَّةً وَأَعَدَّ سِيرَتَهُ الذَّاتِيَّةَ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Obukao je formalno odijelo i pažljivo pripremio svoj CV.
sentences.translationEn: He wore a formal suit and prepared his CV carefully.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَاحْتِرَافِيَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio je na pitanja sa samopouzdanjem i visokim profesionalizmom.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions with confidence and high professionalism.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى سَمِيرٌ أَنْ يَحْصُلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ الْمُمْتَازَةِ.
sentences.translation: Samir se nada da će dobiti ovaj odličan posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir hopes to get this excellent job.
